key.name: status-style
key.summary: Battery status icon style (bold, slim, plain, circle, hidden)

key.name: show-icon-text
key.summary: Show battery percentage text in icon (hidden: 0, horizontal: 1, vertical: 2)

key.name: icon-scale
key.summary: Icon scale as aspect ratio width/height

key.name: dynamic-circle-color
key.summary: Enable dynamic color for circle icon style

key.name: circle-color
key.summary: Default color for the circle icon wheel

key.name: circle-empty-color
key.summary: Empty color for the circle icon wheel (leave empty for default)

key.name: circle-low-color
key.summary: Low battery color for the circle icon wheel

key.name: circle-charge-color
key.summary: Charging color for the circle icon wheel
